areas.name: Starting Village
areas.description: A quiet village where new adventurers begin their journey. The village has a rustic charm with cobblestone streets and timber-framed buildings.

areas.name: Dark Forest
areas.description: A mysterious forest filled with ancient trees, hidden paths, and dangerous creatures. The canopy blocks most sunlight, creating perpetual twilight.

areas.name: Ancient Ruins
areas.description: Crumbling structures of a forgotten civilization. Strange magic still lingers in these ruins, and valuable artifacts can be found among the debris.

areas.name: Underground Caverns
areas.description: Dark, winding tunnels beneath the surface. These caverns are home to strange fungi, glowing crystals, and creatures that have never seen sunlight.

areas.name: Frozen Peaks
areas.description: Icy mountain peaks where the air is thin and the winds are fierce. Ancient dragons are said to nest in the highest caves.

rooms.name: Village Square
rooms.description: The central gathering place of the village. A stone fountain stands in the center, and notice boards post quests and announcements.

rooms.name: Blacksmith Shop
rooms.description: Weapons and armor line the walls. The sound of hammer on anvil echoes through the building. Grimbold the Blacksmith works here.

rooms.name: Rusty Tankard Tavern
rooms.description: A rowdy tavern filled with adventurers sharing tales over ale. The air smells of smoke, spilled beer, and roasted meat.

rooms.name: Training Grounds
rooms.description: An open field where new adventurers practice combat. Straw dummies and training weapons are available for use.

rooms.name: Forest Path Entrance
rooms.description: The beginning of a narrow path that leads into the Dark Forest. The trees seem to lean closer here, blocking out the sky.

rooms.name: Ancient Temple Entrance
rooms.description: A massive stone doorway carved with forgotten runes. The air here feels heavy with ancient magic.

rooms.name: Cave Entrance
rooms.description: A dark opening in the hillside. Cool, damp air flows from within, carrying the scent of earth and mushrooms.

rooms.name: Temple Inner Sanctum
rooms.description: The heart of the ancient temple. A massive crystal floats in the center of the room, pulsing with soft light.

rooms.name: Crystal Cavern
rooms.description: A vast cavern filled with glowing crystals that illuminate the space with soft blue light. The crystals hum with energy.

rooms.name: Frozen Pass
rooms.description: A narrow mountain pass covered in ice and snow. The wind howls through the gap, making it difficult to stand.
